name: The Story Pages
description: The pages of Mara's storybook are all mixed up! Put them in the right order by dragging them into the numbered slots.

pages.illustration: A character waking up in bed with sunshine through the window
pages.text: One bright morning, Pip woke up ready for a new adventure.

pages.illustration: A character leaving a cosy home, backpack on, waving goodbye
pages.text: Pip packed a bag and set off down the winding path.

pages.illustration: A character arriving at a village with a fountain and bunting
pages.text: After a long walk, Pip arrived at the cheerful Learning Village.

pages.illustration: Two characters meeting and shaking hands, both smiling
pages.text: There, Pip met a new friend who needed help.

pages.illustration: Characters celebrating with stars and confetti around them
pages.text: Together they solved every puzzle and celebrated their adventure!

hints: Read each page carefully — what do you think happens first in the story?
The first page shows someone waking up in the morning. Can you find that one?
Think about what happens in a story — beginning, middle, and end. Which pages feel like a beginning?
failureMessage: Nearly there — think about what would happen first. Take your time, there is no rush.

reward.text: You put the story back together perfectly! Mara is so grateful. Here is your second golden key piece!
